items.title_en: Record-breaking solo rower Kelsey Pfendler arrives in Hawaii

items.title_cn: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
items.title_en: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
items.summary_cn: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?
items.summary_en: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?

items.title_cn: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
items.title_en: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
items.summary_cn: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.
items.summary_en: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

items.title_cn: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
items.title_en: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
items.summary_cn: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.
items.summary_en: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.

items.title_cn: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
items.title_en: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
items.summary_cn: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”
items.summary_en: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”
